title: Ship MCP Server Definitions
description: Schema for .ship/mcp.jsonc — shared MCP server definitions referenced by agent configs via "mcp": { "servers": ["<id>", ...] }.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

servers.description: Server definitions keyed by server ID. Each key becomes the server's id if the id field is empty.

id.description: Server identifier. Defaults to the object key in the servers map.

name.description: Human-readable server name shown in `ship mcp list` and editor UI.

command.description: Binary to run for stdio servers, e.g. npx, ship, antigravity.

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the server binary.

env.description: Environment variables for the server process. Values may use ${VAR} syntax for shell variable expansion.

url.description: URL for http or sse transport servers. Required when server_type is http or sse.

scope.description: Server scope — project-local or globally available.

server_type.description: Transport type. stdio (default) runs a local process; http and sse connect to a URL.

disabled.description: When true, the server definition is retained but not activated during compilation.

timeout_secs.description: Connection timeout in seconds for this server.
